# hrobot_rdns (Resource)

Manages the reverse DNS (PTR) entry for a single IP address.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hrobot_rdns" "example" {
  ip  = "203.0.113.1"
  ptr = "host.example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) The IP address to set the PTR record for. Changing it replaces the resource.
- `ptr` (String) The PTR record (reverse DNS hostname).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The IP address (mirrors `ip`).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Reverse DNS entries are imported by IP address.
terraform import hrobot_rdns.example 203.0.113.1
```
